channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Epworth man stabbed multiple times for refusing to attend National Hero Major General Dzihwema’s Burial
item.description: The High Cost of Saying NO!: Epworth Man Left for Dead After Spurning National Hero’s Burial HARARE – In the flickering shadows of the Manjemanje shops in Hopley Zone 6, the distinction between patriotic duty and personal survival was blurred with the jagged edge of a broken beer bottle. On the evening of 5 July [...] The post Epworth man stabbed multiple times for refusing to attend National Hero Major General Dzihwema’s Burial first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mnangagwa gifts vehicles to journalists Zenzele Ndebele and Robert Tapfumaneyi @nehandaradio
item.description: President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s government has handed brand-new off-road vehicles to journalists Zenzele Ndebele and Robert Tapfumaneyi, two media practitioners with long histories of facing harassment while reporting in Zimbabwe. The post Mnangagwa gifts vehicles to journalists Zenzele Ndebele and Robert Tapfumaneyi appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Zimbabwe Teams Up With United Kingdom, Spain, South Africa and Zambia as Air Zimbabwe Restarts London Gatwick Flights, Reconnecting Europe and Southern Africa Through a New Three-Weekly Air Link From July 2026
item.description: Zimbabwe Teams Up With United Kingdom, Spain, South Africa and Zambia as Air Zimbabwe Restarts London Gatwick Flights, Reconnecting Europe and Southern Africa Through a New Three-Weekly Air Link From July 2026 — via Travel And Tour World #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Travel And Tour World

item.title: Retired military chiefs urge Zimbabweans to revolt against constitutional amendments @nehandaradio
item.description: Retired military officers and former senior civil servants have urged Zimbabweans to organise and peacefully oppose Constitutional Amendment Act No. 6, describing it as an assault on the 2013 Constitution. The post Retired military chiefs urge Zimbabweans to revolt against constitutional amendments appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: The Borrowdale Tesla Accident: What Really Happened When Tinashe Mutarisi Jr’s Luxury Car Clashed Head-On?
item.description: The affluent suburb of Borrowdale, typically a sanctuary of manicured lawns and high-walled estates, was recently the scene of a high-profile collision that has reignited a fierce national debate regarding road safety, privilege, and accountability. In the early evening hours of Wednesday, 8 July 2026, a white Tesla Model Y—a symbol of modern luxury and [...] The post The Borrowdale Tesla Accident: What Really Happened When Tinashe Mutarisi Jr’s Luxury Car Clashed Head-On? first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Kylian Mbappé has a goal and an assist as France beats Morocco 2-0 in the World Cup quarterfinals
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass.— Kylian Mbappé spread his arms out wide and spun around after scoring his eighth goal of this year’s World Cup. He later gave the jubilant France fans dotted around the stadium a wave when he left the game because of an injury scare. Les Bleus, with a star striker who said he’s fine [...] The post Kylian Mbappé has a goal and an assist as France beats Morocco 2-0 in the World Cup quarterfinals appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Junior MP’s plea for Wicknell Chivayo to buy cars and iPhones sparks outrage in Zimbabwe @nehandaradio @wicknellchivayo
item.description: A Junior Parliament member’s appeal for Wicknell Chivayo to buy cars and iPhones for young legislators has sparked widespread criticism over Zimbabwe’s culture of entitlement. The post Junior MP’s plea for Wicknell Chivayo to buy cars and iPhones sparks outrage in Zimbabwe appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: How moving from single-use to reusable packaging protects firms from geopolitical turmoil
item.description: Disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz have tightened global petrochemical feedstock supply and driven plastic prices to record highs, jumping nearly 40% since February. Several prominent Asian petrochemical producers have already invoked force majeure and halted plastic production. Since 40% of all plastic is used for single-use packaging, these market shocks cause dramatic price hikes [...] The post How moving from single-use to reusable packaging protects firms from geopolitical turmoil appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Malema Trashes Mnangagwa’s CAB3 @EFFSouthAfrica @Julius_S_Malema
item.description: Tinashe Sambiri| Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF) leader Julius Malema’s criticism of Zimbabwe’s controversial Constitutional Amendment No. 3 has sparked a... Continue reading "Malema Trashes Mnangagwa’s CAB3" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Old Mutual Seeks VFEX Listing to Restore Zimbabwe Share Trading After Six-Year Suspension @ZSE_ZW
item.description: HARARE – Financial services group Old Mutual Limited is set to migrate its Zimbabwe secondary listing from the Zimbabwe Stock Exchange to the Victoria Falls Stock Exchange (VFEX), a move that will allow local shareholders to resume trading after a six-year suspension. The proposed migration marks the end of one of Zimbabwe’s longest-running capital market [...] The post Old Mutual Seeks VFEX Listing to Restore Zimbabwe Share Trading After Six-Year Suspension appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Creditors called to first meeting as ZB Building Society liquidation process begins @nehandaradio
item.description: The Deposit Protection Corporation has announced the first creditors’ meeting for ZB Building Society following its placement under liquidation, with claims due by July 27. The post Creditors called to first meeting as ZB Building Society liquidation process begins appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Listed Property Funds Attract Renewed Investor Interest as REIT Trading Rebounds @ZSE_ZW
item.description: HARARE – Zimbabwe’s listed real estate investment trusts (REITs) experienced a strong recovery in market activity during June, with investors returning to property-backed securities despite a modest decline in overall sector valuations, according to the latest figures released by the Zimbabwe Stock Exchange. Market data shows that turnover in the REIT segment more than doubled [...] The post Zimbabwe’s Listed Property Funds Attract Renewed Investor Interest as REIT Trading Rebounds appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: ‘Go now or leave in a Coffin’: 78,000 Zimbabweans flee xenophobia as South Africans threaten brutal murders
item.description: The Great Return: 78,000 Zimbabweans Flee SA Xenophobia – What Lies Beneath the Exodus? Johannesburg – A silent, yet profound, reversal of migration is unfolding across Southern Africa. Zimbabwe has confirmed the return of over 78,000 of its nationals from South Africa, a mass exodus driven by escalating xenophobic fears and a looming deadline that [...] The post ‘Go now or leave in a Coffin’: 78,000 Zimbabweans flee xenophobia as South Africans threaten brutal murders first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Shock as Munyaradzi Chiturumani stabs wife 30 times and flees with 6-year-old daughter
item.description: The chilling screams from a St. Louis suburb apartment balcony were so intense that neighbours immediately dialled 999. A woman was heard crying out that she was going to die. When police and emergency medical personnel arrived at the Shadycreek Court address around 5 pm, they were met with a scene of horrific violence. A [...] The post Shock as Munyaradzi Chiturumani stabs wife 30 times and flees with 6-year-old daughter first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: End of the road for Harare’s most wanted criminals: Deadly brothers arrested for 24 counts of armed robbery and rape!
item.description: Harare Rocked by Spate of Violent Robberies and Sexual Assaults: Brothers Face 24 Counts Harare – A wave of terror has gripped residents in and around Harare following a series of brutal armed robberies and sexual assaults that occurred over a nine-day period last month. Two brothers, Fortune Ngoshi (32) and Pride Ngoshi (29), have [...] The post End of the road for Harare’s most wanted criminals: Deadly brothers arrested for 24 counts of armed robbery and rape! first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Air Zimbabwe announces fares for restored Harare-London route @3menonaboat
item.description:
The national carrier confirmed that the route will resume on 22 July 2026, operating three times weekly

The post Air Zimbabwe announces fares for restored Harare-London route first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat
